core_mechanism: derivation of closed-form identities among infinite series and definite integrals by elementary term-rearrangement and generating-function-style manipulation, linking discrete combinatorial quantities to special constants
brief_reason: The abstract's only substantive claim is that identities relating a special constant (the Riemann zeta function) to binomial coefficients and harmonic numbers are established 'predominantly by means of elementary analysis,' i.e. by elementary manipulation of series and integrals to produce closed-form identities, so the text supports only this coarse identity-derivation machinery as the most specific defensible mechanism.
